title: Albemarle Announces New Global Business Unit Alignment
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Aug. 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a leader in the global specialty chemicals industry, today announced that it will realign its Bromine and Lithium global business units (GBU) into a new corporate structure designed to better meet customer needs and foster talent required to deliver in a competitive global environment.

title: Albemarle Concludes Strategic Review of Catalysts Business
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Aug. 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a leader in the global specialty chemicals industry, today announced that as a result of its strategic review of the business, Albemarle has chosen to retain its Catalysts business under a separate, to-be-named entity and wholly owned subsidiary of Albemarle.

title: Lithium outlook bullish, according to leading producer Albemarle
text: One of the world's leading lithium producers, Albemarle Corp., has said that average realised pricing for lithium is expected to be up by between 225% and 250% year-on-year, as demand from electric vehicle battery manufacturers continues strong. Albemarle said last week in commentary accompanying second quarter results that its own earnings are expected to grow approximately 500% year-over year, allowing that output volumes will also increase by between 20% and 30%.
